title: Canvas Seed Profiles
description: Validation schema for /canvas seed profile files. A seed file is an array of instance profiles, one per parallel discussion session.

instance_label.description: Human-readable label for this instance (e.g., 'Group A', 'Group B').

cultural_profile.description: Hofstede cultural dimension values for this instance. Applied to the Arbiter's facilitation behavior.

power_distance.description: High: hierarchy shapes facilitation and call order. Low: all perspectives treated as equal authorities.

individualism.description: High: positions compete on merits. Low: facilitation pushes toward consensus.

uncertainty_avoidance.description: High: evidence and risk mitigation demanded before resolution. Low: ambiguity tolerated; Deferred is a valid outcome.

time_orientation.description: Long-term: sustainability and future implications emphasized. Short-term: immediate deliverables and current velocity emphasized.

indulgence.description: High: exploratory discussion allowed; tangents may be followed. Low: strict agenda adherence; tangents parked immediately.

agent_profiles.description: Big Five (OCEAN) psychological profiles for each of the five perspective agents. Applied to each agent's spawn prompt argumentation preamble.

big_five_profile.description: One agent's Big Five (OCEAN) profile. All values are continuous 0.0–1.0. For any given dimension, the five agents within an instance must span at least a 0.4 range (max - min >= 0.4).

openness.description: Openness to experience. High: unconventional framings, comfort with ambiguity. Low: proven approaches, literal framing.

conscientiousness.description: Conscientiousness. High: demands specificity and systematic tradeoff analysis. Low: accepts directional answers, intuitive arguments.

extraversion.description: Extraversion. High: longer responses, engages actively with others. Low: concise, domain-scoped responses.

agreeableness.description: Agreeableness. High: seeks merit in others, proposes compromise. Low: leads with objections, sustains disagreement.

neuroticism.description: Neuroticism. High: surfaces risks and failure modes, hedges. Low: opportunity-focused, states positions with confidence.
